# Copilot Instructions

This is a student portfolio website built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, hosted on GitHub Pages.

## Context
- The developer is a computer science student building their first professional portfolio
- The codebase uses no frameworks or build tools — just vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS
- CSS custom properties (variables) are used for theming; dark mode should extend these
- Projects are rendered from a JavaScript data array in `script.js`

## Preferences
- Keep suggestions beginner-friendly and well-commented
- Prefer CSS custom properties over hardcoded color values
- Avoid introducing npm, build tools, or external dependencies unless explicitly asked
- When adding new sections or components, follow the existing HTML structure and naming conventions
- Accessibility matters: suggest `aria` attributes and semantic HTML where appropriate

## File Overview
- `index.html` — main page structure; sections are clearly commented
- `style.css` — all styles; uses `:root` custom properties for theming
- `script.js` — data arrays for projects/skills and render functions
